title: Mouse-wheel weapon cycling collapses N notches to 1 (M2.2)

history.note: Landed 5d90a94 (fix(input): M2.2 mouse-wheel weapon cycling steps once per notch via pcQueueWeaponCycleSteps). NOT verified: headless cannot inject SDL wheel events (commit validated the wheel=+3 path by hand), sim_state_hash does not exercise it. Needs a wheel-notch cycling lane.
